beta.bannerDescription: OLS is under active development. Some features may change and bugs may occur. Your feedback is invaluable to improve the platform.
beta.feedbackDescription: Help us improve OLS by sharing your feedback, suggestions or bugs encountered.
beta.feedbackPlaceholder: Describe your feedback, suggestion or the issue encountered...
beta.conditionsIncludedDesc: Access to all available modules on the Munin Atlas and Hugin Lab platforms, including sample management, microbiological identification, messaging and collaborative tools.
beta.conditionsInProgressDesc: New features are added regularly. Check updates to discover what's new.
beta.conditionsLimitationsDesc: Some features are being improved. Occasional bugs may occur. Performance is being progressively optimized.
beta.conditionsDataDesc: Your data is stored securely. Regular backups are performed. In case of issues, contact our support team.
beta.conditionsFeedbackDesc: Use the built-in feedback button or contact our support team for any questions or issues.
beta.conditionsSlaDesc: We aim for maximum platform availability. In case of planned maintenance, you will be notified in advance.
